evals.prompt: Write a draft ADR in docs/adrs for adopting a guided repository bootstrap workflow for new projects. Use parent idea-00001-project-bootstrap-copilot.
evals.expected_output: A new main ADR saved under docs/adrs with parent idea-00001-project-bootstrap-copilot and the standard ADR sections filled in.
expectations: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/adrs.
The new file front matter has type adr, role main, status draft, and parent idea-00001-project-bootstrap-copilot.
The new file includes Context, Decision, and Consequences sections with concrete content.
The Context names decision drivers or options considered, and the Consequences include at least one downside.

evals.prompt: Create an active ADR in docs/adrs for using ADRs to record major technical decisions in this repo. Use parent <id>.
evals.expected_output: A new main ADR saved under docs/adrs with status active, parent <id>, and the standard ADR sections filled in.
expectations: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/adrs.
The new file front matter has type adr, role main, status active, and parent <id>.
The new file includes Context, Decision, and Consequences sections with concrete content.
The Decision explains why the chosen option won, and the Consequences include at least one downside.

evals.prompt: Add a patch ADR in docs/adrs to adr-00020-checkout-risk-review that clarifies when suspicious guest checkout orders require manual review.
evals.expected_output: A new patch ADR saved under docs/adrs with parent adr-00020-checkout-risk-review and the standard ADR structure.
expectations: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/adrs.
The new file front matter has type adr, role patch, status draft, and parent adr-00020-checkout-risk-review.
The new file includes Context, Decision, and Consequences sections with concrete content.
The Context names the existing decision being clarified, and the Consequences include at least one downside.
